hero.bio2: My approach integrates strategic database design, clean architecture backend development, and reactive frontend user experience, all articulated through continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) workflows.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.caption: The short version.
aboutMe.p1: I'm Martin, a full-stack software developer focused on creating comprehensive solutions. My specialty is connecting database design with clean backend architectures and reactive frontend.
aboutMe.p2: I work with automated CI/CD pipelines that ensure quality and delivery speed. From planning to deployment, I focus on building scalable and maintainable software.
aboutMe.p3: I'm passionate about transforming complex ideas into functional products, always seeking the balance between performance, usability, and development best practices.

freelance.description: Development of landing pages and web applications from scratch using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript. Angular (PrimeNG) and React up to the final deployment in production.
bullets: AI-First Development: Implementation of workflows using Claude Code.
Backend Development: Working with .NET and Node.js; design of hybrid persistence architectures using SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.
Frontend Development: Development of high-performance reactive interfaces on Angular (PrimeNG) and React.
DevOps & Deployment: Containerization with Docker and orchestration of automated deployments via GitHub Actions (CI/CD).

encodelabs.description: Full-stack development and quality assurance at Encodelabs, contributing to scalable web applications and ensuring product stability through manual testing.
bullets: Frontend Development: Implementation of scalable and reactive user interfaces using Angular, PrimeNG and TailwindCSS, ensuring a fluid and professional user experience (UX).
Systems Integration: Consumption and linking of RESTful APIs with the frontend, guaranteeing correct data communication and efficient state management in the application.

Quality Assurance (QA): Execution of the complete testing cycle for the Vivero productivo municipal Quilino, from strategic test case design to defect reporting and tracking in Jira, raising product stability standards.
Architecture & Best Practices: Application of agile methodologies for functional component delivery, collaborating in a high-performance technical environment.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.caption: The arsenal for building digital experiences.

vigil.title: Vigil 24x7
vigil.description: Intelligent management system for private security with automated digitization of operational processes.

caseStudy.challenge: Private security companies manage shift schedules and attendance records using handwritten paper forms, leading to manual data entry errors, delayed reporting, and inefficient resource allocation across multiple sites.
caseStudy.approach: Built an integral platform for human resources optimization and attendance control. The system implements an OCR (Optical Character Recognition) engine to transform handwritten shift forms into processable digital data, eliminating manual entry errors. Includes an automated dashboard for critical metrics visualization and real-time personnel management.

features.title: OCR Engine
features.description: Optical Character Recognition system that transforms handwritten shift schedules into structured digital data, eliminating manual entry errors.

features.title: AI-First Workflow
features.description: Intelligent processing pipeline that automates data extraction, validation, and integration into the management system.

features.title: Automated Dashboard
features.description: Real-time visualization of critical metrics: attendance, shift coverage, overtime hours, and personnel allocation across sites.

features.title: CI/CD Pipeline
features.description: Containerized with Docker and automated deployments via GitHub Actions for continuous integration and delivery.

vivero.title: Vivero Quilino
vivero.description: Full-stack agricultural e-commerce platform for the digitalization and scalability of regional sales.

caseStudy.challenge: The Quilino Municipal Nursery needed to modernize its sales processes, which were carried out in a traditional and limited way. The challenge was to design a digital solution that would centralize the product catalog, manage orders in real time, and expand the nursery's reach toward a functional and scalable e-commerce model.
caseStudy.approach: Developed the end-to-end user interface alongside a team, prioritizing modular architecture and reactivity. The platform enables fluid catalog navigation, shopping cart management, and clean integration with backend services. A professional design system was implemented using advanced component libraries to guarantee an optimal user experience (UX).

features.title: Reactive Catalog
features.description: Dynamic interface built with Angular that allows filtering and searching agricultural products with high performance.

features.title: E-commerce Management
features.description: Shopping cart system and automated order flow linked with WhatsApp to simplify sales conversion.

features.title: Inventory Management (CRUD)
features.description: Implementation of a complete system for adding, removing, and modifying products and services, ensuring the catalog is kept updated in real time.

cnn.title: CNN Architecture Comparison
cnn.description: Benchmarked three CNN architectures on 120K+ food images, proving EfficientNetB0 matches ResNet-50 while being 5.9x smaller.

portfolio.title: Personal Web Portfolio
portfolio.description: Single-page portfolio with custom full-page navigation, cursor-reactive gradients, and 95+ Lighthouse scores.

scraper.title: Wikipedia Scraper
scraper.description: Async crawler with 100 concurrent workers, O(1) URL deduplication, and a 20-second global deadline.

library.title: University Library System
library.description: Java MVC console app with inheritance hierarchies, polymorphic loan rules, and custom CSV persistence.

bullets: Dissertation 'Comparative Evaluation of CV Pipelines for Food Recognition': benchmarked fine-tuned YOLOv8s, a YOLO + EfficientNetB0 hybrid, and GPT-5.2 across a 14-class produce task, 4 image conditions, and 1,440 inferences. Winning pipeline integrated into a full-stack app.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind?
contact.description: I'm available for new projects. Send me an email and let's talk.
